name: html-ppt-agent-skill
description: Project generation, production and backup themes, CJK typography, visual planning, semantic visual QA, bundling, browser QA, PDF export, examples, and automated tests for the HTML PPT agent skill.

scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:browser
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run example:validate && npm run example:manifest && npm run example:visual && npm run example:bundle && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs examples/ai-ad-workflow/dist/ai-ad-workflow.html
scripts.themes:validate: node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html && node scripts/validate-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html
scripts.themes:qa: node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/swiss-grid/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/swiss-grid && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/editorial-ink/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/editorial-ink && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/technical-field/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/technical-field && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-magazine/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-magazine && node scripts/qa-deck.mjs assets/themes/guizang-swiss/preview.html --screenshots qa/themes/guizang-swiss
